english translation text: Your magnificence is a blessing for everyone

urdu transliteration text: Tere naam  per e mere Khuda
english translation text: On your name I would sacrifice

urdu transliteration text: Meta dil fidaa meri jaan fidaa
Meri ruuh ki hai yehi sadaa
english translation text: The voice of my soul is that...

urdu transliteration text: Tera naam lab pe rahe sadaa …
english translation text: Your name may remain on my lips forever
Whatever pleases you may remain my wish
He reached the highest place through his perfection
He drove out the darkness through his beauty
Send blessings upon him and his family
